## Validation
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:run`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Migration check if schema changed

## Deployment or Env Impact
- [ ] No deployment/env changes
- [ ] Env variables changed
- [ ] Database migration added
- [ ] Docs updated

## Notes
- Branches should be short-lived and based on `main`.
- Docker is local-only and should not be treated as a production target.
